name: novel_data_scraper
description: Scrapes web novel platform data including trending novels, ranking lists, reader demographics, and market trends. Invoke when user needs platform data collection, market research, or trending novel analysis.
instructions: Analyze the user's request to determine which platforms and data types to scrape
Use appropriate scraping methods to collect data from specified platforms
Clean and standardize the collected data
Return structured JSON data with platform statistics and trend analysis
Respect platform terms of service and implement rate limiting

platforms.description: Target platforms to scrape data from

limit.description: Limit of records to scrape, default 100
